overview.description: The Brookstone Active ETF (BAMA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that seeks to provide total return by investing in stocks, bonds, and cash and cash equivalents. The fund typically allocates 40%-80% of its assets in stocks BAMA was launched on Sep 28, 2023 and is issued by Brookstone.
